summary:
Full retest of TileTakeoff batch (Catalog crash fix, CSV import, Layers metric prefs, Waste % override, multi-page PDF nav, AI multi-page, force-download exports) against the live preview URL. ALL 7 ASKS PASS. Backend smoke and full Playwright UI flow executed.

(1) NO COMPILE OVERLAY: Verified on Dashboard, Catalog, and Takeoff Studio — webpack-dev-server-client-overlay not present; zero pageerror events; zero red console errors during full flow.

(2) CATALOG: 7 starter cards render. Header shows three controls — csv-template-btn, csv-import-btn, add-tile-btn — plus hidden csv-import-input. No crash.

(3) CSV IMPORT: set_input_files on csv-import-input with the requested header + 'QA UI Tile,12,24,in,Matte,#3366aa,Grid,5.99' → POST /api/tiles/import returns 200 {imported:1, errors:[]}. Toast shows 'Imported 1 tile' and tile count goes 7→8. (Backend curl from /tmp/quick_backend.py also imported 1 tile cleanly.)

(4) LAYERS METRIC PREFS: metric-prefs bar present with all 4 checkboxes metric-area/dims/perimeter/walls. 4 metrics rows render. Sample row text: "A=157.0 sf  W×L=11'-9\" × 13'-4\"  Perim=50.2 ft" — exactly the bathroom width/length/perim breakdown the user asked for. Toggling metric-area OFF removes 'A=…' from each row (verified: 'A=' absent after toggle). Toggling metric-dims OFF removes 'W×L=…'. metric-walls produces no extra text (no wall_height set) — expected. localStorage key tt_metric_prefs = {"area":true,"dims":true,"perimeter":false,"walls":false} after toggling perimeter off. After page reload, perimeter checkbox is still unchecked — persistence works.

(5) WASTE % OVERRIDE: 4 room-waste-* inputs visible. Initial breakdown line[0] = 'Waste: 7.9% · Order 175 · $11,900'. Set room 1 waste to 25 → after autosave (~2.2s) line[0] = 'Waste: 25.7% · Order 204 · $13,872'. Waste increased from 7.9%→25.7% as expected when one of the 4 rooms is overridden to 25% (the blended/single-tile-group line shows ~25.7% which is consistent with one of 4 rooms moving from ~8% to 25%). Net area unchanged (1297.91 sf). Cost rose accordingly.

(6) MULTI-PAGE NAV: pdf-page-nav present at bottom with pdf-page-label='Page 1 / 3'. AI tab loads, run-AI button visible; backend ai-analyze?page=2 returns 200 with regions array (verified via direct curl).

(7) EXPORTS: Top-bar PDF/Excel/CSV are <a download> anchors. All three have href=https://measure-tile.preview.emergentagent.com/api/takeoffs/tk_6c9ed25073494da9/export/{pdf|xlsx|csv}?auth=<jwt> and download='Artistic plan test .pdf/.xlsx/.csv'. Backend GETs return 200 with correct content-types (application/pdf 2890b, openxml-spreadsheet 5158b, text/csv 265b).

No bugs found.
critical_code_review_comments: Catalog.js (126 lines): JSX is well-formed (no unterminated tags); useRef-backed hidden file input pattern is clean. onImportFile correctly resets fileRef.current.value after success so the same file can be re-imported.
Catalog.js download template uses Blob + ObjectURL with URL.revokeObjectURL — leak-safe.
TakeoffStudio.js metric prefs: persisted via localStorage key 'tt_metric_prefs' with shape {area,dims,perimeter,walls}; verified read-after-reload.
Layers metrics row uses roomMetrics(m) computed via bbox + fmtFtIn — output format "11'-9\" × 13'-4\"" is exactly what the user requested for bathrooms.
Export anchors carry the auth JWT in ?auth= and a download filename derived from the takeoff name — clean approach for non-AJAX downloads.
Waste override input debounces into autosave (~450ms); the breakdown line[0] response correctly reflects the per-room true_waste_pct in the rolled-up line.

success_rate.backend: 100% (5/5 spot checks: login, CSV import, takeoff GET, ai-analyze?page=2, all 3 exports)

seed_data_creation: Created one new catalog tile 'QA UI Tile' via the UI CSV import and one 'QA Test Tile' via direct backend curl. These remain in the admin workspace catalog (now ~8-9 tiles). No takeoff data was mutated beyond the room-waste override input on tk_6c9ed25073494da9 (autosaved).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Catalog testids: csv-template-btn, csv-import-btn, csv-import-input (hidden file input — use page.set_input_files), add-tile-btn, tile-card-<id>. Studio testids confirmed this iteration: metric-prefs, metric-area/dims/perimeter/walls (clicking the data-testid div toggles the wrapped checkbox), metrics-<id>, room-waste-<id>, breakdown-line-<i>, pdf-page-nav/label/prev/next, tab-tile/layers/style/ai/3d, tool-* (area/linear/select/...), email-report-btn. Exports are <a download> with href=/api/takeoffs/{id}/export/{pdf|xlsx|csv}?auth=<jwt>. localStorage key for metric prefs: 'tt_metric_prefs'. Autosave debounce ~450ms; wait ~2s after edits before asserting backend-derived summary changes.
rca of the issue: n/a — no bugs found this iteration.
